name: XPLR Infrastructure, LP
description: XPLR Infrastructure, LP (NYSE: XIFR) is a limited partnership that owns clean energy infrastructure assets with a focus on contracted renewable energy projects with long-term, stable cash flows. XPLR Infrastructure is focused on creating value for its unitholders through disciplined capital allocation of the cash flows generated by its assets and is positioning itself to benefit from the expected long-term growth in the U.S. energy markets. Headquartered in Juno Beach, Florida, XPLR Infrastructure’s portfolio of contracted clean energy assets consists of wind, solar and battery storage projects in the U.S.
